ogTitle: Arnold West vs Arthurs Creek: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Arnold West and Arthurs Creek.
heading: Arnold West vs Arthurs Creek — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Arnold West, Victoria and Arthurs Creek, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Arthurs Creek has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Arnold West (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Arnold West or Arthurs Creek safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Arnold West has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Arthurs Creek scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Arnold West scores 48/100 for bushfire risk. Arthurs Creek scores 17/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Arnold West or Arthurs Creek?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Arthurs Creek has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.67% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
